pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 1.3.2 to 3.4.1 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 for the build environment.
Switch maven-compiler-plugin from source/target to release flag for proper cross-compilation support in Java 9+.
Update maven-enforcer-plugin to strictly require Java 21 or higher.
Remove deprecated springfox-swagger dependencies incompatible with Spring Boot 3.
Remove deprecated embedded MongoDB dependencies that are incompatible with modern Java/Spring.

src/main/resources/application.yaml.general_idea: Removed embedded MongoDB configuration in favor of a standard external MongoDB URI.
